description_long: This ornate sconce features a central vertical stem with elaborate detailing, from which six gracefully curved arms extend outward in a radial pattern. Each arm supports a lampshade, likely made of frosted or translucent glass, giving the fixture a classic and elegant appearance. The arms and central stem appear to be constructed from a dark, possibly metallic material, providing a striking contrast to the lighter shades. The fixture is suspended from a decorative ceiling mount, which is also adorned with intricate patterns and shapes. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm and shade evenly spaced around the central axis. This sconce is reminiscent of traditional chandeliers often found in upscale urban interiors or historic public buildings.
description: A classic, multi-arm sconce with six frosted glass shades and ornate metallic detailing, suspended from a decorative ceiling mount. The design is symmetrical and elegant, evoking a vintage chandelier style.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms and shades symmetrically arranged, with the central stem and ceiling mount clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the arms and the profile of the shades, with three arms visible in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms and shades from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with three arms in the foreground and the profile of the fixture emphasized.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage chandelier style with ornate, classical detailing and symmetrical arm arrangement. The design evokes elegance and traditional craftsmanship.
